zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Hopton於大約1427年出生在英國賀福爾史道頓 奧 阿洛時，她的父親Thomas Hopton40歲，母親Eleanor Lucy22歲。她於大約1445年與Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年6月22日在英國史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素享年72歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Hopton于大约1427年出生在英国賀福爾史道頓 奧 阿洛时，她的父亲Thomas Hopton40岁，母亲Eleanor Lucy22岁。她于大约1445年与Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年6月22日在英国史洛普爾霍普頓 卡素享年72岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Hopton, such as those in Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Suffolk, from Old English hop ‘remote enclosed place’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Hopton was born about 1427, in Staunton on Arrow, Herefordshire, England, her father, Thomas Hopton, was 40 and her mother, Eleanor Lucy, was 22. She married Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire about 1445, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 June 1498, in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Hopton est née environ 1427, à Staunton on Arrow, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hopton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Lucy, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire environ 1445, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1498, à Hopton Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Shropshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1445 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1498 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Hopton Castle, Shropshire, England und wurde in Shropshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire circa 1445, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hoptonが約1427年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアスタウントン オン アローで生まれた時，父Thomas Hoptonは40歳，母Eleanor Lucyは22歳であった。約1445年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでSir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年6月22日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホープトン カストルで72歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hopton(이)가 대략 1427년 영국 허퍼드실르 스타운턴  아로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hopton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Lucy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 6월 22일 영국 슈럽실르 홉턴 카스틀에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Hopton nasceu aproximadamente 1427, em Staunton on Arrow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hopton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Lucy, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire aproximadamente 1445, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1498, em Hopton Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Hopton родилась около 1427 г. в местности стаунтон он арроу, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Hopton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Lucy, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire около 1445 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 июня 1498 г. в местности хоптон кастл, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Hopton nació aproximadamente 1427, en Staunton on Arrow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hopton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eleanor Lucy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire aproximadamente 1445, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1498, en Hopton Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
